subject: [PATCH v8 2/2] selftests/firmware: add search path test for firmware_class.search_path=

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a new selftest, fw_search.sh, to validate the firmware_class.search_path= module parameter. The test covers various scenarios including prioritized path ordering, empty paths, and handling of special characters in directory names. It also tests the interaction between search_path= and path= parameters. The test creates temporary directories for firmware and restores original values after each test case.
